title: Fix mem_arst.v to be legal
body:
I was running some yosys tests on Verilator and the mem_arst.v test needs the patch attached to be applied to be legal.

You might also want to consider an enhancement to add a similar error message.

Thanks!

```
   Error: tests/simple/mem_arst.v:13: Duplicate declaration of signal: 'Data_o'
   note: ANSI ports must have type declared with the I/O (IEEE 2017 23.2.2.2)
     reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o;
  output [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,
```

```
diff --git a/tests/simple/mem_arst.v b/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
index 9bd38fcb..88d0553b 100644
--- a/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
+++ b/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
@@ -7,11 +7,9 @@ module MyMem #(
   input                  Clk_i,
   input  [AddrWidth-1:0] Addr_i,
   input  [DataWidth-1:0] Data_i,
-  output [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,
+  output reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,
   input                  WR_i);

-  reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o;
-
   localparam Size = 2**AddrWidth;

   (* mem2reg *)

```
code_blocks:
Error: tests/simple/mem_arst.v:13: Duplicate declaration of signal: 'Data_o'
   note: ANSI ports must have type declared with the I/O (IEEE 2017 23.2.2.2)
     reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o;
  output [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,

diff --git a/tests/simple/mem_arst.v b/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
index 9bd38fcb..88d0553b 100644
--- a/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
+++ b/tests/simple/mem_arst.v
@@ -7,11 +7,9 @@ module MyMem #(
   input                  Clk_i,
   input  [AddrWidth-1:0] Addr_i,
   input  [DataWidth-1:0] Data_i,
-  output [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,
+  output reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o,
   input                  WR_i);

-  reg [DataWidth-1:0] Data_o;
-
   localparam Size = 2**AddrWidth;

   (* mem2reg *)
